body:
Hey Amara,

Wanted to reach out because I've been following [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital)'s recent moves in climate infrastructure and I think there's a real conversation to be had here. I'm co-founding a new venture focused on grid-edge intelligence — essentially AI-native software for distributed energy resource management — and we're in the early stages of putting together our seed round. Given your background at the intersection of climate and AI infra, you felt like the right person to start with rather than going through the usual warm intro chain. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next couple of weeks to hear what we're building? I can send over a brief deck in advance if that's helpful.

Best,
Mina
